results.title: TikTok - Make Your Day
results.snippet: TikTok - المقاطع الرائجة تبدأ من هنا. باستخدام جهازك أو من خلال الويب، يمكن للمشاهدين مشاهدة واكتشاف الملايين من الفيديوهات القصيرة المخصصة. قم بتنزيل التطبيق لتبدأ.

results.title: Log in | TikTok
results.snippet: Manage your account, check notifications, comment on videos, and more.

results.title: TikTok - Make Your Day
results.snippet: TikTok - trends start here. On a device or on the web, viewers can watch and discover millions of personalized short videos. Download the app to get started.

results.title: Watch trending videos for you | TikTok
results.snippet: It starts on TikTok. Join the millions of viewers discovering content and creators on TikTok - available on the web or on your mobile device.

results.title: Sign up - TikTok
results.snippet: Sign up for an account or log back into TikTok. Create an account to discover real people and real videos that will make your day.

results.title: For You - TikTok LIVE feed
results.snippet: Watch TikTok LIVE streams from the creators you follow or explore LIVE streams of gaming, lifestyle, chats, outdoors, talents, fashion, and more. Have fun interacting with others in real time.

results.title: TikTok Coins: Buy and recharge Coins to send Gifts | TikTok
results.snippet: Get Coins to send Gifts to TikTok LIVE hosts here! Buy or recharge TikTok Coins at a lower price, with more payment options and a customizable recharge amount.

results.title: Explore - Find your favourite videos on TikTok
results.snippet: Discover the latest TikTok videos on our Explore page. Stay up-to-date on the latest trends and explore your interests here!
